---
title: Events
page-navigation: false
css: 
  - past-events-styles.css
  - upcoming-events-styles.css 
listing:
  - id: upcoming-events
    template: upcoming-events-template.ejs
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    categories: unnumbered
  - id: year_2026
    contents: events/
    page-size: 999
    template: past-events-template.ejs
    template-params:
      year: 2026
  # - id: year_2025
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2025
  # - id: year_2024
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2024
  # - id: year_2023
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2023
  # - id: year_2022
  #   contents: events/
  #   sort: "date desc"
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2022
  # - id: year_2021
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2021
  # - id: year_2020
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2020
  # - id: year_2019
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2019
  # - id: year_2018
  #   contents: events/
  #   page-size: 999
  #   template: past-events-template.ejs
  #   template-params:
  #     year: 2018
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-expand: 3
toc-location: left
page-layout: full #right
repo-actions: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="/assets/javascript/clear_filter_button.js" defer></script>
---
<style>
:root{
  --theme-main: #00883A;
  --theme-main-dark: #246f3f;
}
  
.listing-actions-group{
  gap:3rem;
}
h2{
  border:none;
}
.btn-primary{
  background: var(--theme-main) !important;
  border: 1px solid var(--theme-main) !important;
}
.btn-primary:hover{
  background: var(--theme-main-dark)!important;
}
</style>




```{=html}
<div class="card">

  <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
    <span class="flex-grow-1 text-truncate">This Title Is A Bit Too Long, but the card-header Automatically Truncates It When It Gets to the Badge on the Right</span>
    <span class="badge text-bg-light border ms-2 text-nowrap">Conference</span>
  </div>


  <!-- start row -->
  <div class="row g-0">
    <div class="col-md-2">
      <img src="/events/images/conference.svg" class="img-fluid rounded-start" alt="...">
    </div>


    <div class="col-md-10">
      <div class="card-body">
        <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">07-15 Sept, 2026</h6>
        <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">9:00-17:30 | Library, Address Here 80549 Munich | Hybrid | EN</h6>
        <p class="card-text">This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer. This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer. This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content. This content is a little bit longer.</p>
        <p class="card-text">
          <small class="text-body-secondary">
          Organizers: John Doe
          <br>
          Presenters: Jane Doe, John Smith, Jane Smith
          <br>
          Host(s): John Doe, Jane Doe
          </small>
        </p>

      <!-- end card-body -->
      </div>
    <!-- end col-md-10 -->
    </div>
  <!-- end row -->
  </div>
  


  <div class="card-footer">
    Maybe Contact here?
  </div>


</div>
<!-- add some space before the upcoming events header -->
<br>
<br>
```



<!-- another card option, or at least some ideas for handling people -->
```{=html}
<div class="card">
  <div class="card-header d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2">
    <span class="flex-grow-1 text-truncate">Open Science in Practice</span>
    <span class="badge text-bg-light border ms-2 text-nowrap">Conference</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-2">07–15 Sept 2026</h6>
    <h6 class="card-subtitle mb-3">9:00–17:30 | Library, Address Here | Hybrid | EN</h6>

    <p class="card-text">
      This is a wider card with supporting text below as a natural lead-in to additional content.
    </p>

    <div class="mt-4">
      <h6 class="text-uppercase text-body-secondary fw-semibold mb-3">People</h6>

      <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 g-3">
        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Organizers</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Anna Meier</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Ben Fischer</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Clara Novak</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Presenters</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Daniel Klein</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Eva Smith</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Instructors</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Fatima Ali</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Jonas Weber</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Helpers</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Lea Vogel</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Max Roth</span>
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">Nina Scholz</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="col">
          <div class="small text-body-secondary fw-semibold">Hosts</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-1">
            <span class="badge rounded-pill text-bg-secondary">OSC Team</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```



## Upcoming Events

::: {#upcoming-events}
:::


## Past Events


### 2026
::: {#year_2026}
:::


<!-- ### 2025

::: {#year_2025}
:::

### 2024

::: {#year_2024}
:::

### 2023

::: {#year_2023}
:::

### 2022

::: {#year_2022}
:::

### 2021
::: {#year_2021}
:::

### 2020
::: {#year_2020}
:::

### 2019
::: {#year_2019}
:::

### 2018
::: {#year_2018}
::: -->
